originalBehavior: The published map scene loads a US vector map with local CSS, JavaScript, and custom jvm assets so the coloring demo initializes immediately on first render.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published map-first runtime and vendors the Bootstrap, jQuery, jvectormap, custom jvm, and US-map assets directly under the route tree for subpath hosting.
notes: The local root intentionally maps to the interactive map scene instead of the upstream promo landing page.
The shared footer handles public provenance so the shipped body stays focused on the demo.
evidence: Implementation planning treated map initialization with local vector-map assets as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage verifies the map container mounts and the vendored vector-map runtime initializes without broken asset loads.

originalBehavior: The published demo starts with hidden region fills, exposes a Show Colors toggle that reveals the coloring overlay, and lets readers reshuffle the visible palette while keeping the scene interactive.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published hidden-color default state, Show Colors or Hide Colors toggle, and Shuffle Colors button with the original palette-offset logic.
notes: The local copy reuses the published palette and button-label flow instead of rewriting the interaction model.
Color reshuffling only affects currently visible regions, matching the shipped map scene.
evidence: Implementation planning treated Show Colors, Hide Colors, and Shuffle Colors behavior as parity-critical.
Shared smoke coverage toggles the color overlay, checks the button text update, then verifies a shuffle changes at least one visible region fill.

originalBehavior: The published map lets readers select regions to reveal their color classes, then clears the selection and returns to the hidden-color state when the background is clicked.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published region-selection handler, per-region fill updates, and background-click reset behavior intact under the local asset tree.
notes: Selected regions still use the published color indexing instead of a local remapping.
Background reset restores both the hidden-color state and the Show Colors button label.
evidence: Implementation planning treated region selection and background reset as parity-critical behavior.
Shared smoke coverage selects a region, verifies the fill state changes, then clicks the map background and checks that the scene returns to its default hidden-color state.

originalBehavior: The published family exposed GitHub-ribbon and promo-style provenance surfaces in the public body while using route-local CSS and JavaScript paths from the site root.
localStatus: The local copy rewrites canonical metadata and asset paths for the subpath-hosted route, removes the body-level provenance surfaces, and leaves the shared footer as the only public original-page reference surface.
notes: The shipped body no longer exposes the upstream GitHub ribbon or video-link navigation.
The local route keeps its own vendored asset tree instead of depending on root-relative upstream paths.
evidence: The public-surface audit blocks body-level creator, source, or promo links outside approved shared-footer configuration.
Implementation planning called for patching only shell metadata and nested-hosting behavior while preserving the published runtime first.
